de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort

Class AbstractSort

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort.AbstractSort
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Sort
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ArraySort, GenericSort, ProgramSVSort, ProxySort, SortImpl

    public abstract class AbstractSort
extends Object
implements Sort
    Abstract base class for implementations of the Sort interface.

      Returns the direct supersorts of this sort.

      Returns the direct supersorts of this sort.

      Tells whether the given sort is a reflexive, transitive subsort of this sort.
